articles.title: Critical Security Gaps Uncovered in LLM Guardrails: Implications for Enterprise AI
articles.author: AI Security Brief
articles.excerpt: Recent research reveals significant vulnerabilities in the safety guardrails of large language models (LLMs), exposing organizations to manipulation and data integrity risks. Enterprises must urgently reassess their generative AI deployments to address these security gaps.
articles.metaTitle: Researchers Discover Major Security Gaps in LLM Guardrails
articles.metaDescription: Explore the major security gaps discovered in LLM guardrails and learn how organizations can strengthen generative AI deployments against manipulation and exploitation.

articles.title: Hive0163 Deploys AI-Assisted Slopoly Malware for Persistent Access in Ransomware Attacks
articles.author: AI Security Brief
articles.excerpt: Hive0163's use of AI-generated Slopoly malware marks a new escalation in ransomware tactics, enabling persistent access and demanding advanced defensive strategies.
articles.metaTitle: Hive0163 Uses AI-Assisted Slopoly Malware for Persistent Access in Ransomware Attacks
articles.metaDescription: Discover how Hive0163 leverages AI-assisted Slopoly malware for persistent access in ransomware attacks, signaling a new era of cyber threat sophistication.

articles.title: OpenClaw AI Agent Flaws Expose Risks of Prompt Injection and Data Exfiltration
articles.author: AI Security Brief
articles.excerpt: Security vulnerabilities in the OpenClaw AI agent could allow prompt injection and unauthorized data exfiltration, highlighting urgent gaps in AI agent security protocols.
articles.metaTitle: OpenClaw AI Agent Flaws Could Enable Prompt Injection and Data Exfiltration
articles.metaDescription: Explore the security flaws in OpenClaw AI agents that could lead to prompt injection attacks and data exfiltration, and learn how to mitigate these risks.

articles.title: Australia's Privacy Act Reforms 2026: What You Need to Know
articles.author: AI Security Brief
articles.excerpt: Australia's Privacy Act has undergone its most significant overhaul since 1988 — with new penalties reaching $50 million, mandatory disclosure of AI decision-making systems, and a new statutory tort for serious privacy invasions. Here's what changed and what it means for your organisation.
articles.metaTitle: Australia's Privacy Act Reforms 2026: Full Breakdown
articles.metaDescription: Australia's Privacy Act reforms 2025-2026 explained: $50M penalties, AI automated decision-making rules, new individual rights, GDPR comparison, and compliance deadlines.

articles.title: Agentic AI Security Risks: What Every Developer Must Know
articles.author: AI Security Brief
articles.excerpt: Autonomous AI agents are now embedded in enterprise workflows with privileged access to databases, APIs, and critical systems — but the security infrastructure governing them hasn't kept pace. Here's what developers and security teams need to understand right now.
articles.metaTitle: Agentic AI Security Risks: What Developers Must Know
articles.metaDescription: Agentic AI security risks are exploding in 2026. Prompt injection, excessive permissions, data exfiltration, and supply chain attacks in autonomous AI agents explained.

articles.title: How AI Is Being Used to Launch Cyberattacks in 2026
articles.author: AI Security Brief
articles.excerpt: AI has crossed a threshold in 2026 — adversaries are no longer just using it to write phishing emails. Autonomous attack agents, AI-generated malware, and deepfake social engineering are redefining the threat landscape at machine speed.
articles.metaTitle: How AI Is Used to Launch Cyberattacks in 2026
articles.metaDescription: AI-powered cyberattacks surged in 2025–2026. Learn how threat actors use AI phishing, deepfakes, autonomous agents, and AI malware — with real stats and examples.

articles.title: AI Model Prompt Injection Attacks Explained
articles.author: AI Security Brief
articles.excerpt: Prompt injection is the #1 vulnerability in deployed AI systems — and unlike traditional software flaws, it cannot be patched. Here's how direct and indirect attacks work, real-world exploits from 2024–2026, and the defence strategies that actually reduce risk.
articles.metaTitle: Prompt Injection Attacks Explained: Direct vs Indirect
articles.metaDescription: Understand prompt injection attacks in AI models: direct vs indirect types, real-world CVEs, jailbreaking techniques, and proven defence strategies for 2025-2026.
